# opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution (Resource)

Configure OSPF redistribution.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution" "example" {
  redistribute = "connected"
  description  = "Redistribute connected routes into OSPF"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `redistribute` (String) The protocol to redistribute. One of `"bgp"`, `"connected"`, `"kernel"`, `"rip"`, `"static"`.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description for this redistribution. Defaults to `""`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this redistribution. Defaults to `true`.
- `linked_route_map` (String) UUID of the route map to apply. Defaults to `""`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the OSPF redistribution.

## Import

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) to import opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution using the `id`. For example:

```terraform
import {
  to = opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution.example
  id = "<opnsense-resource-id>"
}
```

Using `terraform import`, import opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution using the `id`. For example:

```console
% terraform import opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution.example <opnsense-resource-id>
```
